specific_question: What percentage markup did Elexion Automotive partnering dealers add to its manufacturer's suggested retail prices (MSRP) on average in 2024?
answer: Throughout the year 2024, Elexion Automotive partnering dealers added an average markup of 9% above its MSRP.
dr_question: How will Elexion Automotive's adoption of a complete direct-to-customer sales model by 2026 affect sales cycle duration, conversion rates, and average revenue per customer across the United States with franchise laws?
